title: Schlechteranthus subglobosus
taxonomy: Schlechteranthus subglobosus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae. It belongs to the genus Schlechteranthus, which is a group of plants native to southern Africa. The genus Schlechteranthus is further classified under the subfamily Ruschioideae and the family Aizoaceae. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other plants. Schlechteranthus subglobosus is a succulent plant, and its classification reflects its unique adaptations to its arid habitat.
